uncommon: has access requirements or requires GM approval
rare: has access requirements or requires GM approval
strength: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
dexterity: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
constitution: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
wisdom: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
intelligence: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
charisma: has an emphasis on this ability modifier
anythingLore: has a lore than recall about anything
armorFamiliarity: scales armor with your class proficiency
exploration: upgrades or creates an exploration activity
infiniteHealing: can heal itself and/or an ally indefinitely
metastrike: offers an activity that contains or improves a Strike
resistance: offers some form of damage resistance
skillScaling: has a feature that automatically increases a non-lore skill to legendary
unarmed: grants an unarmed attack or has metastrikes that can use them
weaponFamiliarity: matches proficiency with some types of weapons to your class proficiency
